title: The Road to the Rooftop Opens
description: On pages 9–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Beast Pirates, Kaido, Ace, Straw Hat Pirates as The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
scene: The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aaah... Strawhat got away. We've caused Kaido some trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stop Bullying My Men, Will You?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't expect the former warlord, jinbe the Knight of THE sea to be so childish.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the HELMSMAN of the straw hat pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, my bad. I caught a glimpse of you once...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd rather you used the title with MORE worth to it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I could see your face, it'd probably jog my memory.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Back when you were still a member of the warlords, that's why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Well, not that it matters anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Heh heh.... too bad you won't be seeing it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Onigashima outside the dome

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wooah!! Two Dino- Saurus came crashing in!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: They are the flying six!! Our enemies!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff... Huff... nobody comes here, so we are safe.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What is this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Where did those cowards run off to!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: KILLOW

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's a statue of a dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's been abandoned here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: After my friend broke it...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Your friend?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that woman... I'll make sure to crack her head in half....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A few years ago... He came to kill my father...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "Ch. Y98 / end

summary: This section advances the Wano - The Worst Generation Reaches the Roof storyline with 25 dialogue beats. The raid reaches its decisive stage as the Tobiroppo are revealed, Yamato remembers Ace, and the Worst Generation reaches the rooftop to face Kaido and Big Mom.
